creator: tscott3@yahoo.com
text:
Created attachment 219755
sysctl_freebsd_11.3-p6.

I have a 4 drive bay connected via USB. When moving files ZFS goes offline due to errors. When i boot using 11.3 kernel, I see no errors.

storageZFS01:/usr/src % sudo zpool status -xv 
  pool: pool-4diskusb
 state: UNAVAIL
status: One or more devices are faulted in response to IO failures.
action: Make sure the affected devices are connected, then run 'zpool clear'.
   see: http://illumos.org/msg/ZFS-8000-HC
